headline: Bruins Fall Behind Sabres While Red Sox Bullpen Melts Down Against Yankees
morning_brew: Are you kiddin' me with this Bruins game? We are back at the Garden, the place is jumpin', and we let the Buffalo Sabres walk away with a 3-1 win to take a 2-1 lead in the series. Tanner Jeannot gave us some life in the second period, but the offense completely dried up after that. Jeremy Swayman was solid enough with 25 saves on 27 shots, but you simply aren't winning playoff games with one goal. It is absolutely brutal to see them trailing a Sabres team we should be putting away.

Over at Fenway, it was the same old story for the Sox. Tolle was absolutely electric on the mound, sitting down 11 Yankees via the strikeout over six innings of one-run ball. You cannot ask for a better start in the oldest yard in baseball. But then the bullpen comes in and the wheels come off. Danny Coulombe gets tagged for three earned runs in the seventh, and just like that, it is a 4-2 loss and our third straight defeat. At 9-16, this team is buried in the basement of the AL East.

The only thing keeping us going right now is the NFL Draft and the Celtics heading to Philly tonight. The Patriots are coming off a 14-3 season but have plenty of holes to fill, so I am glued to the Round 1 wrap-up news. Meanwhile, the C's are looking to bounce back in their series after a 56-win regular season. After that 2024 championship run, we know what this core is capable of, but they need to show more heart on the road than the B's did last night. Time to see if they have that championship grit.

trend_watch.dans_take: A wicked performance at Fenway wasted by a bullpen that could not hold a lead if their lives depended on it.
Absolutely brutal outing in the seventh inning that flushed a dominant start down the drain.
We need the big bats to show up when we are playing the Pinstripes, not disappear when the lights are brightest.

news_digest.headline: Sabres rally to beat Bruins 3-1, take 2-1 lead in NHL playoff series
news_digest.dans_take: What a disastah—Buffalo is actually outworking us in our own building.

news_digest.headline: Red Sox take 3-game losing streak into matchup against the Orioles
news_digest.dans_take: At 9-16, this season is already slipping away into the Charles River.

news_digest.headline: Patriots' Round 1 Wrap Up
news_digest.dans_take: Coming off 14 wins, we need to nail these picks to stay at the top of the mountain.
